empty.desc: Explore local MIMIC-III clinical notes in plain language, or use the clinical support tools. The model always asks for your approval before it queries the database.
empty.starter1: How many notes are in each category?
empty.starter2: Find a radiology report that mentions pneumonia
empty.starter3: Give me a record summary for SUBJECT_ID 109

composer.placeholder: Type your question (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for a new line)
composer.placeholderHitl: Please respond to the tool approval request above…
composer.disclaimer: All inference runs on local Ollama; every tool call needs your approval.

noExport: Nothing to export in the current chat.
